Input
0 0

Output
0 XNOR45 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
1 XNOR56 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR67 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
3 XNOR70 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
4 NOT1 = NOT(1) = 0
